# zohomail_domain_catch_all (Resource)

Manage the Zoho Mail catch-all address for a domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_domain" "example" {
  domain_name = "example.com"
}

resource "zohomail_domain_catch_all" "example" {
  domain_name       = zohomail_domain.example.domain_name
  catch_all_address = "support@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `catch_all_address` (String) Mailbox address that should receive catch-all messages.
- `domain_name` (String) Zoho Mail domain name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Catch-all resource identifier. Equal to `domain_name`.
